## What this PR does

One-paragraph summary.

## Why

Link to the issue / discussion / design doc that motivated this. If there isn't one and the change is non-trivial, open an issue first.

## What changed

Concrete file/module-level summary. Not a diff dump — the diff is below.

## Testing

- [ ] `uv run python -m pytest tests/ -q` (fast suite) passes
- [ ] If the change touches a benchmark, re-ran the benchmark and updated the result file in `benchmarks/<name>/results/`
- [ ] If the change touches `BENCHMARKS.md` numbers, the underlying result file is in this PR or already in `main`

## Anything reviewers should look at first?

A specific file, a tradeoff worth flagging, a numerical gap that surprised you.

## Out of scope

What you considered but didn't do, and why. Helps reviewers calibrate the change.
